sigWerErrors.reason: The subject changes from 'I' (tôi) to 'sorry', which is a completely different meaning and derails the intent of the sentence.
'liên' (connect) is substituted with 'lên' (go up), which changes the meaning of the action and makes the sentence incoherent in context.
Omitting 'trợ' (support) removes the key part of 'hỗ trợ' (support), making the sentence incomplete and losing the intended meaning.
